## Thinking-Mode Guidelines (General Thinking Pack)

This project adopts the General Thinking Pack. At the start of each session,
read `docs/agent-guidelines/general/AGENTS.md` and keep its rules active
throughout. It defines the operating loop (Understand → Investigate → Plan →
Execute → Verify → Report), ten iron rules, and a Module Index; whenever a
trigger in the Module Index fires, read the referenced module under
`docs/agent-guidelines/general/guidelines/` before acting. Explicit user
instructions override the pack; note any override in your report.

Also read `docs/agent-guidelines/general/recommended-tools/README.md`
when available. Prefer matching installed Claude Code plugins and Codex
skills listed there; do not silently install missing companion tools.

### Web building scenario (Web Building Thinking Pack)

When building or modifying any web page or web UI (static pages, artifacts,
landing pages, dashboards, app screens), additionally read
`docs/agent-guidelines/web-building/AGENTS.md` (extends the General Thinking
Pack). It defines the web building loop (Intend → Structure → Style → Adapt
→ Harden → Verify) and a Module Index; load the referenced modules under
`docs/agent-guidelines/web-building/guidelines/` as their triggers fire.
Within web-building tasks it takes precedence over the general pack where
they differ.

Also read `docs/agent-guidelines/web-building/recommended-tools/README.md`
when available. Prefer matching installed Claude Code plugins and Codex
skills listed there; do not silently install missing companion tools.
